full_text:
Niu Dan 牛亶
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Niu Dan (牛亶). Sent by the Han to replace Liu Zhang when Zhao Wei rebelled. Niu Dan was affiliated with the Han Dynasty.
